narrative:
Bowling Green Township (precinct in Licking County) has 1,278 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
